name: AI Transparency
description: AI model observability and transparency dashboard for inspecting inference logs, confidence distributions, and neural feedback cycles across deployed models.

pages.notes: High-level model health: stats-overview shows latency, throughput, error rates; neural-feedback-loop shows aggregate decision cycle patterns
Chronological inference trace: each entry shows input, output, confidence, latency, and token usage with expandable reasoning chains
Intent-radar visualizes confidence spread across categories; stats-detail breaks down per-model and per-endpoint metrics

page_briefs.model-overview: High-level health dashboard. KPI stat cards across the top showing latency, throughput, and error rates. Below, a neural feedback loop summary visualization showing aggregate decision cycle patterns as a flow diagram.
page_briefs.inference-log: Chronological scrollable timeline of inference entries. Each row shows timestamp, input snippet, output snippet, confidence score badge, latency, and token count. Rows are expandable to reveal full reasoning chains.
page_briefs.confidence-explorer: Data exploration view. Radar chart visualization showing confidence spread across categories dominates the upper area. Below, a detailed stats breakdown table with per-model and per-endpoint metric rows.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area for data exploration
